title: Create: Nerfad
description: Most missing recipes for Create Fly
body:
<details>
  <summary>TL;DR</summary>

<details>
<summary>New Create Recipes:</summary>

- Compacting:

 1. Crimsite (as a starter for redstone)
 2. Diamond (from coal blocks)
 3. Asurine (Zinc production line)
 4. Veridium (Copper starter. Have a brass.)
 
- Crushing:

 1. Glowstone
 2. Netherrack (Blaze Cake starter and a 0.5% chance for wither skeleton skulls)
 3. Cinder Flour from Rotten Flesh (beware of by-products)
 
- Haunting:

 1. Coal (charcoal to coal give coalblocks for diamond recipe)
 2. Leather (from Rotten Flesh)
 
- Mixing:

 1. Obsidian (for wither cage, tools & armor)
 2. Tuff (for crushing: iron, copper, gold, zinc)

- Smoking: 
  
1. Bonemeal from Rotten Flesh


</details>

<details>
<summary>New Minecraft Recipes:</summary>

The purpose is to be able to uncraft found items. My modpack [EinsEinundzwanzigElf](https://modrinth.com/modpack/einseinundzwanzigelf) annoyed me by not being able to uncraft that items and that I had to throw them away.

- Crafting:

1. Chainmail Helmet
2. Chainmail Chestplate
3. Chainmail Leggings
4. Chainmail Boots
5. Copper Horse Armor
</details>


<details>
  <summary>Rotten Flesh update in version 1.2.3</summary>
The researches about uses for rotten flesh came up with not one but three uses for that formerly annoying piece of useless something.

  
- To have leather you may haunt it.
- For bonemeal smoke it.
- For cinderflour (and gold nuggets and maybe diamonds) crush it.  
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>New Generators for cobble, stone and gravel</summary>
3 types of generators (mechanical press recipes):

  
- 64 Gravel
- 64 Cobble
- 64 Stone

![Generator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o320dRNP/images/8893141afbc93c002eb9ea34c67ee477749dad1a.jpeg)

Each bonk with the mechanical press delivers a full 64 items stack. However, this is not early game. You need a good supply of lava as these generators do eat your lava very quickly. A nether lava train is required to have enough lava for these generators. Heating up the blaze burner can be done i.e. with charcoal and an mechanical arm.

And of course this is not the full truth: Each bonk wants 1 item of the to-deliver items. So in reality you get only 63 items from each bonk. Sorry for that.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Known Issue with Create Fly 6.0.9 build-3</summary>

In Create Fly 6.0.9 build-3 JEI wrongly displayed a mixer for compacting recipes. The mixer won't work. Put a mechanical press instead. In the JEI's tab the mechanical press is displayed correctly. But in the big picture is shown an animated mixer.
(2026-02-06 Konitor)

This issue is fixed in Create Fly 6.0.9 build-4
(2026-02-11 Konitor)
</details>

</details>

# Not Enough Recipes For A Dummy.
(The dummy is me, Konitor.)

This is a datapack recipe mod written for my modpack [EinsEinundzwanzigElf](https://modrinth.com/modpack/einseinundzwanzigelf). As such it is only needed on the server side. It mainly provides recipes for the mod "[Create Fly](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fly)". Now it is possible to produce more ores than the Create mod initially allows. This datapack-mod makes some ores renewable:

- Coal (from charcoal)
- Diamond (from Coal Blocks + Lava + Heating; 1 diamond ~ 160 logs)
- Glowstone (and Quartz and Netherite Scrap; from soul sand)
- Redstone (and Iron; from Crimsite)
- Obsidian
- Copper, Iron, Gold and Zinc (from Tuff)
- Copper (from Veridium)
- Zinc (from Asurine)
- Netherrack -> For blaze cakes but the real purpose is wither skeleton skulls


![Diamonds from Coal Blocks and Lava](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o320dRNP/images/02b0051dc5091127d6c97e26b35f7f30c58372dc.jpeg)

Recipe mods like JEI / EMI will tell you how to do that. 

Made for the modpack [EinsEinundzwanzigElf](https://modrinth.com/modpack/einseinundzwanzigelf) for Minecraft 1.21.11 Fabric loader with Notepad++ and 7zip on a Windows 11 Computer
and Google AI telling me what to do.

Please report issues or new recipe proposals at the [Discord Link](https://discord.gg/pFPRhpeSDr).
